guarantee.title: You can begin with peace of mind
guarantee.body: If you haven't started the diagnostic after payment, you'll receive a full 100% refund (within 1–3 business days). Per the nature of digital content, withdrawal may be limited once you've started the diagnostic or after the report is auto-generated, in accordance with Article 17(2)(5) of Korea's Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce. A full refund is always provided if the report is not delivered within 24 hours due to our fault.

faq.a1: About 15 minutes on average. Short — yet enough to organize your first act of living-it-out this week.
faq.q2: 📩 When do I receive the report?
faq.a2: Your custom report is auto-generated the moment you submit, available right away on My Page.
faq.q3: ✅ Can I start right after payment?
faq.a3: Yes. If you're logged in, you proceed to the next step immediately. If not, you can sign in and continue.
faq.a4: A custom report including a core one-line definition, Top 3 strengths, 3 first actions for this week (if-then), and a 3-week living-it-out routine.
faq.a5: Best suited for people who want to meet their inner mission and vision in a single line, who want to live out their identity and strengths on top of that mission, and who hope that the days they live out become nourishment for someone walking the same road.
faq.a6:
If you haven't started the diagnostic after payment, you'll receive a full 100% refund. We confirm your payment record and process the refund — typically within 1–3 business days.

However, per the nature of digital content, once you've started the diagnostic or the report is auto-generated, withdrawal may be limited under Article 17(2)(5) of Korea's Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce. A full refund is always provided if the report is not delivered within 24 hours due to our fault.

Please send refund requests to our customer service email.
faq.q7: 🔁 How is this different from MBTI or other personality tests?
faq.a7: Personality tests describe you as a type. Life Portfolio uses your 76 answers to build a single volume made only for you — and includes 3 first actions for this week and a 3-week living-it-out routine. Not classification, but a blueprint that connects discovery to living-it-out.
faq.a8: Yes. Your response data is used only to generate your report, and is visible only to you on My Page. We never publicly disclose, sell, or share it.
faq.q9: 🌱 Can this report mean something to others, too?
faq.a9: A day you've truly lived out becomes the most honest guide for another walking the same road. Life Portfolio walks alongside you in the flow where a discovered mission, lived out, becomes solid nourishment for someone else.
faq.q5b: 🙏 Can I use it alongside my prayer or devotional practice?
faq.a5b: Yes. Life Portfolio doesn't replace any faith tradition's tools. Keep it next to the prayer, meditation, or scripture journal you already use, and add one line — what to live out this week — on top of that flow.

terms.art1_p: These Terms set out the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between Faise (the "Company") and users in connection with the use of the Life Portfolio personalized report service (the "Service") provided by the Company.
terms.art2_1: "Service" means the provision of a personalized Life Portfolio report by analyzing the user's responses to an online survey.
terms.art2_2: "User" means a person who uses the Service provided by the Company under these Terms.
terms.art2_3: "Member" means a person who can use the Service by signing in via Firebase Authentication using a Google account, email, or similar.

terms.art4_2: The Company may change the Service for unavoidable reasons such as technical issues, in which case prior notice will be given.

terms.art7_1_lead: Pursuant to Article 17 of the Korean Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, users may request withdrawal and a refund in the following cases:
terms.art7_1_a: Where the diagnostic has not been started after payment is complete (no system log of diagnostic entry): full refund
terms.art7_1_b: Where the diagnostic link or report is not provided within 24 hours of payment due to the Company's fault: full refund
terms.art7_1_c: Where duplicate payments are made for the same product: full refund of the duplicate payment
terms.art7_2_lead: In the following cases, withdrawal and refund are restricted under the prior notice given pursuant to Article 17(2)(5) (commencement of digital content provision) and Article 17(6) of the same Act:
terms.art7_2_a: Where the user has entered the diagnostic page and started answering at least one question (however, as a matter of policy, the Company may refund 50% of the payment if the diagnostic is not submitted within 24 hours of starting).
terms.art7_2_b: Where the user has completed submission of the diagnostic and the report has been automatically generated.
terms.art7_2_c: Where the user has viewed or downloaded the report.
terms.art7_3: The Company clearly indicates the withdrawal restrictions of this Article on the payment screen and in these Terms, and fulfills its obligation under Article 17(6) of the Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce by providing a preview (sample report) before the diagnostic begins.

privacy.effective: This Policy takes effect on June 19, 2026. privacy.s1_p: Collecting Life Portfolio diagnostic responses and providing reports; payment and refund processing; customer inquiry handling; service quality improvement and statistical analysis.
privacy.s2_1: Required: Name (or nickname), email, password (for email sign-up — stored one-way encrypted; the company does not store or view plaintext), payment information (approval records, order/transaction records)

privacy.s2_3: Automatically collected: Access logs, IP, browser/device info, authentication tokens and login records generated and verified during Firebase Authentication
privacy.s2_4: Collection channels: Payment page, in-house diagnostic test pages, customer service, Firebase Authentication (Google account login and email/password sign-up) (* Google Forms is not used under normal operation, and may be used only as an auxiliary channel when the test is temporarily operated manually in emergencies such as a website outage.)
privacy.s3_2: Payment and goods/service provision records: 5 years
privacy.s3_5: Other items are destroyed without delay upon achieving the purpose (separate retention may apply under applicable laws).
privacy.s4_p: As a general principle, personal information is not provided externally. However, minimal information may be provided to Payple Inc. for payment processing, or pursuant to a legal basis or a lawful request from an investigative agency.
privacy.s5_2: <u>Member authentication and account management: Google LLC (Firebase Authentication)</u>
privacy.s5_3: Survey collection (emergencies only): Google LLC (Google Forms) — normally the in-house diagnostic test is used; Google Forms is used only as an auxiliary tool during temporary manual operation in emergencies such as a website outage
privacy.s5_4: Web hosting / deployment: Google LLC (Firebase Hosting)
privacy.s5_5: Email delivery: an email service provider, as needed
privacy.s6_p: In the course of providing the Service, personal information may be transferred to and stored on overseas servers as listed below. All transmissions are encrypted via SSL.
privacy.s6_1:
Google LLC (USA) – Firebase Authentication and related infrastructure
Items transferred: minimum information required for authentication, including email, name (or nickname), password (one-way encrypted), authentication tokens, and login records

privacy.s6_2:

Items transferred: minimal web assets and access logs
Retention: during the Service operation period

privacy.s8_1: Administrative: least privilege, internal security management, access log review
privacy.s8_2: Technical: HTTPS/SSL, access control, anti-malware, <u>OAuth-based authentication token protection</u>
privacy.s8_3: Physical: access control of computer rooms (including processors)
privacy.s9_p: Personal information is destroyed without delay upon expiration of the retention period or achievement of the processing purpose. Electronic files are permanently deleted via non-recoverable methods; printed materials are shredded or incinerated.

privacy.s15_h: 15. Anonymous Collection and Retention of 'ask' Logs
privacy.s15_p: To improve service quality and response accuracy, the company collects and retains user queries entered in the 'ask' widget anonymously under the following principles.
privacy.s15_1: Collected items: Query text, visitor state, page location, response status
privacy.s15_2: Collection method: User identifier (uid) masked; IP and User-Agent not collected
privacy.s15_3: Retention period: 90 days from collection (sequentially deleted after expiration)
privacy.s15_4: Purpose: Response quality improvement, category analysis, service improvement reference
privacy.s5_6: Behavioral analytics & UX improvement: Microsoft Corporation (Microsoft Clarity) — activated only when the user has explicitly consented; this consignment does not apply if consent is declined or withdrawn.
privacy.s6_4:
Microsoft Corporation (USA) – Microsoft Clarity (consenting users only)
Items transferred: anonymized behavioral data (clicks, scrolls, session recordings — text input fields are automatically masked), de-identified user ID, page URL
Time & method of transfer: in real time during a consenting user's site use, via HTTPS-encrypted transmission
Purpose of transfer: behavioral analysis for UX improvement
Retention: up to 1 year for consenting users only; discontinued immediately upon withdrawal of consent
Right to refuse: you may decline consent or withdraw it at any time from My Page, and refusal or withdrawal imposes no restriction whatsoever on service use
Legal basis: Microsoft Standard Contractual Clauses (approved by the EU Commission)
privacy.s10_1_a: Session cookies: for maintaining login state and security — may be refused in browser settings (declining may limit login functionality).
privacy.s10_1_b: Firebase Authentication (Google LLC): member authentication — deleted immediately upon membership withdrawal.
privacy.s10_2_a: Google Analytics 4 (Google LLC): anonymous statistical analysis (page views, conversions, etc.). IP anonymization applied. How to refuse — install the browser's GA Opt-out extension.
privacy.s10_2_b: Google Tag Manager (Google LLC): tag management. How to refuse — browser settings.
privacy.s10_3_h: 10-3. Behavioral Analytics Tools (Explicit Consent Required · Opt-in)
privacy.s10_3_a: Microsoft Clarity (Microsoft Corporation): analysis of mouse movements, scrolls, and session recordings (for UX improvement). OFF by default — activated only when the user explicitly consents, and can be withdrawn with one click at any time from My Page.
privacy.s10_notice: Important notice: Microsoft Clarity is activated only when the user explicitly consents. Declining consent imposes no restriction whatsoever on service use. Collected data is anonymized, and text input areas such as passwords and payment information are automatically masked. Collected data is stored on Microsoft servers in the USA; for details, please refer to Article 6 (Cross-Border Transfer of Personal Information).
privacy.s14_h: 14. Protection of Personal Information of Children Under 14
privacy.s14_1: In principle, the company does not collect personal information from children under the age of 14.
privacy.s14_2: At sign-up, age is verified through procedures such as year of birth to determine whether the user is under 14; sign-up is restricted for those confirmed to be under 14.
privacy.s14_3: Should a child under 14 have an unavoidable need to use the Service, a separate procedure shall be provided to enable sign-up with the consent of a legal guardian (currently not offered).
privacy.s14_4: If it is subsequently confirmed that a child under 14's personal information has been collected, the company will immediately destroy such information and notify the legal guardian.

problem.h2: Even when you try harder, your mind won’t settle on some days
problem.lead:
More resolve, even greater effort—sometimes none of it eases that heaviness.
Only when the mission and strengths already within you line up in one sentence does your mind grow lighter and the first step become tangible.
problem.card1_h: You have a direction, <br class="br-md">but the standard for choices isn't yet a single line
problem.card1_p: When what you live for and how you decide become one line, every moment gets lighter.
problem.card2_h: You make plans, <br class="br-md">but the flow that fits you is a different thing
problem.card2_p: An execution flow built from your own results — not someone else's method — lasts longer.
problem.card3_h: Beyond understanding, <br class="br-md">into the place of living it out
problem.card3_p: One step beyond knowing yourself — when this week's first action lands in your hands, life becomes a place you live out.
problem.highlight:
A discovered mission becomes meaning only when it can be lived.
Your one line and 3 first actions for this week are where it begins.

trust.eyebrow: Why you can begin with trust
trust.h2: Instead of nice words, we explain through system and outcomes
trust.lead: From discovery to living-it-out, without breaks within one volume — we designed every flow ourselves.
trust.card1_h: A diagnostic of 76 questions across 11 areas
trust.card1_p: Self-awareness, values, transitions, emotion, relationships, execution and more — 11 areas of question-format mapping derive your own one-line definition.
trust.card2_h: A system that connects via 4 axes
trust.card2_p: Self-understanding → self-expression → self-design → self-execution — not a mere diagnostic, but a 4-stage system that links discovery to living-it-out.
trust.card3_h: Designing for meaning in the AI era
trust.card3_p: Efficiency belongs to AI, meaning belongs to people — Life Portfolio is the place that builds your own 'Only One' volume.
trust.card4_h: Why we don't stop at discovery
trust.card4_p: Studies repeatedly report that writing down a concrete "first action" — rather than a vague resolution — leads to real achievement. That is why Life Portfolio adds three first actions for this week and a 3-week routine to discovery, all in one volume.

insights.h2: Three minutes that make your decision clearer
insights.lead: Notes from the people who built Life Portfolio — on living out mission, vision, and strengths.

card1.title: What Is an 'Asset' — and What Kind of Asset Is Life Portfolio
card1.desc: Self-understanding (clarity of purpose) is the foundational asset on which other assets — career, finance, health, relationships — grow together. We map how that asset is formed with an ontology diagram.

card2.title: Organizing Your Mission, Strengths & Plan — Does It Really Make a Difference?
card2.desc: We look calmly at what changes when only one side organizes and structures from the same starting line — drawing on real comparison studies, including a randomized controlled trial (Morisano 2010) and a 2,928-person quasi-experiment (2019).

card3.title: Why Your Uniqueness Becomes an 'Asset'
card3.desc: Innate uniqueness, left still, is only a 'trait'. When you discover it, live it out, and leave it behind, it becomes an 'asset' that compounds over time.
